Title: Sasaki and Miyano
Actors: Kellen Goff, Joshua Waters, Kayleigh McKee
Plot: Miyano spends his days peacefully reading Boys' Love comics and worrying about how girly his face is-until a chance encounter leads to a scuffle with his senior Sasaki. Intrigued by his feisty junior Miyano, delinquent Sasaki uses every opportunity he can to get closer...
